nasb.text: have you not made distinctions among yourselves, and become judges with evil motives?

esv.text: have you not then made distinctions among yourselves and become judges with evil thoughts?

cnv.text: 這不是你們對人有歧視，成了心懷惡意的審判官嗎？

ccb.text: 你们这样做难道不是偏心待人，心怀恶意地判断人吗？

csbs.text: 难道你们中间不就有了歧视，而你们也成了心怀恶念的审判官吗？
